pabrai.label: Mohnish Pabrai
pabrai.framework: Dhandho: low-risk high-uncertainty bets, low-cost commodity producers, deep value asymmetry

hohn.label: Chris Hohn
hohn.framework: TCI: concentrated large-cap quality with irreplaceable infrastructure-like moats

buffett_weschler.label: Buffett / Weschler
buffett_weschler.framework: Durable moats at fair prices, owner-operator capital allocation, financial strength

greenblatt.label: Joel Greenblatt
greenblatt.framework: Special situations: spin-offs, restructurings, cheap quality via magic-formula economics

munger.label: Charlie Munger
munger.framework: Few great businesses held forever; pay up for quality with pricing power

hk.label: Horizon Kinetics
hk.framework: Hard assets, owner-operators, croupiers and inflation beneficiaries with long-duration optionality

stahl.label: Murray Stahl
stahl.framework: Royalty and toll-booth economics on scarce assets; anti-indexation positioning

lawrence.label: Bryan Lawrence
lawrence.framework: Oakcliff: concentrated positions in predictable cash generators trading below intrinsic value

moi.label: MOI / Mihaljevic
moi.framework: Global deep value and hidden-asset situations off the beaten path
